name: Kuanysh Omarbekov
background: Kuanysh Omarbekov serves as the Chief Operating Officer. He has over 15 years of experience in the uranium mining industry, having held various management positions within Kazatomprom's subsidiaries, including Director of the Mining Department.

company_affiliations.name: National Atomic Company Kazatomprom JSC
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Operating Officer / Member of the Management Board
